pages.text:
**SALE DEED (VERKOOPAKTE / ACTE DE VENTE)**

**Document ID: sale_015**
**Date of Deed: 28 August 2023**
**Place of Execution: Ghent, Belgium**
**Notary: Meester Pieter Van Renterghem, Ghent**

---

**HEADER**

This Sale Deed is entered into on the date written above, by and between:

**Sellers:**
1. Thomas Janssen, born on 9 November 1972, residing at [Insert Address], [Postal Code] [City], Belgium,

2. Sarah Janssen-Peeters, born on 4 February 1975, residing at [Insert Address], [Postal Code] [City],
Belgium,

(hereinafter collectively referred to as "the Sellers")

AND

**Buyers:**
1. [Insert Full Name of Buyer], born on [Insert Date of Birth], residing at [Insert Address], [Postal Code]
[City], Belgium,
2. [Insert Full Name of Buyer], born on [Insert Date of Birth], residing at [Insert Address], [Postal Code]
[City], Belgium,

(hereinafter collectively referred to as "the Buyers")

---

**APPEARANCE**

The undersigned Notary, Meester Pieter Van Renterghem, duly commissioned and qualified to serve in
Ghent, Belgium, hereby certifies the identity of the parties involved in this transaction as well as their
capacity to enter into this Sale Deed.

---

**ORIGIN OF TITLE**

The Sellers acquired the property described herein through a purchase deed dated 7 May 2015, executed
before Notary [Insert Notary's Name], under Notarial Register No. [Insert Number]. The property was

registered in the Land Registry under the following cadastral reference: Ghent, 3rd division, section F,
number 904/M.

---

**OBJECT OF SALE**

The object of this Sale Deed is the apartment located at Stationsstraat 8, 9000 Ghent, Belgium
(hereinafter referred to as "the Property"). The Property is sold in its current condition, together with all
its rights and appurtenances, as well as any common parts associated with the co-ownership of the
building.

---

**PRICE**

The total sale price for the Property is set at two hundred seventy-five thousand Euros (EUR 275,000),
which shall be paid by the Buyers to the Sellers at the signing of this deed, or through standard
escrow/notarial settlement as agreed by both parties.

---

**TRANSFER**

The Sellers hereby agree to transfer ownership of the Property to the Buyers. The transfer of ownership
shall take effect upon the signing of this deed, provided that the payment of the sale price has been
made in full.

---

**COMMON CHARGES**

The Sellers confirm that they are relocating and consolidating family housing arrangements, specifically
linked to Kerkstraat 12. As of the date of this deed, the Sellers shall be released from all common charges
associated with the Property. The Buyers shall assume all rights and responsibilities concerning any
common charges from the date of the signing of this deed forward.

---

**GUARANTEES**

The Sellers guarantee that:
1. They are the rightful owners of the Property and have full authority to sell it.
2. The Property is free from any liens, encumbrances, or claims by third parties, except as disclosed in
the original purchase deed dated 7 May 2015.

3. They will provide all necessary documents as required by law to effectuate the transfer of property
rights.

---

**FISCAL CLAUSES**

The Buyers shall be responsible for all applicable taxes, duties, and costs related to the transfer of
ownership, including but not limited to registration fees, notary fees, and any other fiscal obligations
arising from this Sale Deed.

---

**COSTS**

All costs related to the execution of this Sale Deed shall be borne by the Buyers, unless otherwise
stipulated. The Notary's fees shall be calculated in accordance with the prevailing regulations.

---

**SIGNATURES**

In witness whereof, the parties hereto have executed this Sale Deed on the day and year first above
written.

**Sellers:**

___________________________
Thomas Janssen

___________________________
Sarah Janssen-Peeters

**Buyers:**

___________________________
[Insert Full Name of Buyer]

___________________________
[Insert Full Name of Buyer]

**Notary:**

___________________________
Meester Pieter Van Renterghem

Ghent, Belgium

---

This deed is executed in triplicate, with each party receiving one original copy, and one copy retained by
the Notary for official records.
